name: Club
description: 1d4 Bludgeoning. Properties: Light. Mastery: Slow.

name: Dagger
description: 1d4 Piercing. Properties: Finesse, Light, Thrown (Range 20/60). Mastery: Nick.

name: Greatclub
description: 1d8 Bludgeoning. Properties: Two-Handed. Mastery: Push.

name: Handaxe
description: 1d6 Slashing. Properties: Light, Thrown (Range 20/60). Mastery: Vex.

name: Javelin
description: 1d6 Piercing. Properties: Thrown (Range 30/120). Mastery: Slow.

name: Light Hammer
description: 1d4 Bludgeoning. Properties: Light, Thrown (Range 20/60). Mastery: Nick.

name: Mace
description: 1d6 Bludgeoning. Mastery: Sap.

name: Quarterstaff
description: 1d6 Bludgeoning. Properties: Versatile (1d8). Mastery: Topple.

name: Sickle
description: 1d4 Slashing. Properties: Light. Mastery: Nick.

name: Spear
description: 1d6 Piercing. Properties: Thrown (Range 20/60), Versatile (1d8). Mastery: Sap.

name: Dart
description: 1d4 Piercing. Properties: Finesse, Thrown (Range 20/60). Mastery: Vex.

name: Light Crossbow
description: 1d8 Piercing. Properties: Ammunition (Range 80/320; Bolt), Loading, Two-Handed. Mastery: Slow.

name: Shortbow
description: 1d6 Piercing. Properties: Ammunition (Range 80/320; Arrow), Two-Handed. Mastery: Vex.

name: Sling
description: 1d4 Bludgeoning. Properties: Ammunition (Range 30/120; Bullet). Mastery: Slow.

name: Battleaxe
description: 1d8 Slashing. Properties: Versatile (1d10). Mastery: Topple.

name: Flail
description: 1d8 Bludgeoning. Mastery: Sap.

name: Glaive
description: 1d10 Slashing. Properties: Heavy, Reach, Two-Handed. Mastery: Graze.

name: Greataxe
description: 1d12 Slashing. Properties: Heavy, Two-Handed. Mastery: Cleave.

name: Greatsword
description: 2d6 Slashing. Properties: Heavy, Two-Handed. Mastery: Graze.

name: Halberd
description: 1d10 Slashing. Properties: Heavy, Reach, Two-Handed. Mastery: Cleave.

name: Lance
description: 1d10 Piercing. Properties: Heavy, Reach, Two-Handed (unless mounted). Mastery: Topple.

name: Longsword
description: 1d8 Slashing. Properties: Versatile (1d10). Mastery: Sap.

name: Maul
description: 2d6 Bludgeoning. Properties: Heavy, Two-Handed. Mastery: Topple.

name: Morningstar
description: 1d8 Piercing. Mastery: Sap.

name: Pike
description: 1d10 Piercing. Properties: Heavy, Reach, Two-Handed. Mastery: Push.

name: Rapier
description: 1d8 Piercing. Properties: Finesse. Mastery: Vex.

name: Scimitar
description: 1d6 Slashing. Properties: Finesse, Light. Mastery: Nick.

name: Shortsword
description: 1d6 Piercing. Properties: Finesse, Light. Mastery: Vex.

name: Trident
description: 1d8 Piercing. Properties: Thrown (Range 20/60), Versatile (1d10). Mastery: Topple.

name: Warhammer
description: 1d8 Bludgeoning. Properties: Versatile (1d10). Mastery: Push.

name: War Pick
description: 1d8 Piercing. Properties: Versatile (1d10). Mastery: Sap.

name: Whip
description: 1d4 Slashing. Properties: Finesse, Reach. Mastery: Slow.

name: Blowgun
description: 1 Piercing. Properties: Ammunition (Range 25/100; Needle), Loading. Mastery: Vex.

name: Hand Crossbow
description: 1d6 Piercing. Properties: Ammunition (Range 30/120; Bolt), Light, Loading. Mastery: Vex.

name: Heavy Crossbow
description: 1d10 Piercing. Properties: Ammunition (Range 100/400; Bolt), Heavy, Loading, Two-Handed. Mastery: Push.

name: Longbow
description: 1d8 Piercing. Properties: Ammunition (Range 150/600; Arrow), Heavy, Two-Handed. Mastery: Slow.

name: Musket
description: 1d12 Piercing. Properties: Ammunition (Range 40/120; Bullet), Loading, Two-Handed. Mastery: Slow.

name: Pistol
description: 1d10 Piercing. Properties: Ammunition (Range 30/90; Bullet), Loading. Mastery: Vex.

name: Padded Armor
description: AC: 11 + Dex modifier. Stealth: Disadvantage.

name: Leather Armor
description: AC: 11 + Dex modifier.

name: Studded Leather Armor
description: AC: 12 + Dex modifier.

name: Hide Armor
description: AC: 12 + Dex modifier (max 2).

name: Chain Shirt
description: AC: 13 + Dex modifier (max 2).

name: Scale Mail
description: AC: 14 + Dex modifier (max 2). Stealth: Disadvantage.

name: Breastplate
description: AC: 14 + Dex modifier (max 2).

name: Half Plate Armor
description: AC: 15 + Dex modifier (max 2). Stealth: Disadvantage.

name: Ring Mail
description: AC: 14. Stealth: Disadvantage.

name: Chain Mail
description: AC: 16. Requires Str 13. Stealth: Disadvantage.

name: Splint Armor
description: AC: 17. Requires Str 15. Stealth: Disadvantage.

name: Plate Armor
description: AC: 18. Requires Str 15. Stealth: Disadvantage.

name: Alchemist's Supplies
description: Ability: Intelligence. Utilize: Identify a substance (DC 15), or start a fire (DC 15). Craft: Acid, Alchemist's Fire, Component Pouch, Oil, Paper, Perfume.

name: Brewer's Supplies
description: Ability: Intelligence. Utilize: Detect poisoned drink (DC 15), or identify alcohol (DC 10). Craft: Antitoxin.

name: Calligrapher's Supplies
description: Ability: Dexterity. Utilize: Write text with impressive flourishes that guard against forgery (DC 15). Craft: Ink, Spell Scroll.

name: Carpenter's Tools
description: Ability: Strength. Utilize: Seal or pry open a door or container (DC 20). Craft: Club, Greatclub, Quarterstaff, Barrel, Chest, Ladder, Pole, Portable Ram, Torch.

name: Cartographer's Tools
description: Ability: Wisdom. Utilize: Draft a map of a small area (DC 15). Craft: Map.

name: Cobbler's Tools
description: Ability: Dexterity. Utilize: Modify footwear to give Advantage on the wearer's next Dexterity (Acrobatics) check (DC 10). Craft: Climber's Kit.

name: Cook's Utensils
description: Ability: Wisdom. Utilize: Improve food's flavor (DC 10), or detect spoiled or poisoned food (DC 15). Craft: Rations.

name: Glassblower's Tools
description: Ability: Intelligence. Utilize: Discern what a glass object held in the past 24 hours (DC 15). Craft: Glass Bottle, Magnifying Glass, Spyglass, Vial.

name: Jeweler's Tools
description: Ability: Intelligence. Utilize: Discern a gem's value (DC 15). Craft: Arcane Focus, Holy Symbol.

name: Leatherworker's Tools
description: Ability: Dexterity. Utilize: Add a design to a leather item (DC 10). Craft: Sling, Whip, Hide Armor, Leather Armor, Studded Leather Armor, Backpack, Crossbow Bolt Case, Map or Scroll Case, Parchment, Pouch, Quiver, Waterskin.

name: Mason's Tools
description: Ability: Strength. Utilize: Chisel a symbol or hole in stone (DC 10). Craft: Block and Tackle.

name: Painter's Supplies
description: Ability: Wisdom. Utilize: Paint a recognizable image of something you've seen (DC 10). Craft: Druidic Focus, Holy Symbol.

name: Potter's Tools
description: Ability: Intelligence. Utilize: Discern what a ceramic object held in the past 24 hours (DC 15). Craft: Jug, Lamp.

name: Smith's Tools
description: Ability: Strength. Utilize: Pry open a door or container (DC 20). Craft: Any Melee weapon (except Club, Greatclub, Quarterstaff, and Whip), Medium armor (except Hide), Heavy armor, Ball Bearings, Bucket, Caltrops, Chain, Crowbar, Firearm Bullets, Grappling Hook, Iron Pot, Iron Spikes, Sling Bullets.

name: Tinker's Tools
description: Ability: Dexterity. Utilize: Assemble a Tiny item composed of scrap, which falls apart in 1 minute (DC 20). Craft: Musket, Pistol, Bell, Bullseye Lantern, Flask, Hooded Lantern, Hunting Trap, Lock, Manacles, Mirror, Shovel, Signal Whistle, Tinderbox.

name: Weaver's Tools
description: Ability: Dexterity. Utilize: Mend a tear in clothing (DC 10), or sew a Tiny design (DC 10). Craft: Padded Armor, Basket, Bedroll, Blanket, Fine Clothes, Net, Robe, Rope, Sack, String, Tent, Traveler's Clothes.

name: Woodcarver's Tools
description: Ability: Dexterity. Utilize: Carve a pattern in wood (DC 10). Craft: Club, Greatclub, Quarterstaff, Ranged weapons (except Pistol, Musket, and Sling), Arcane Focus, Arrows, Bolts, Druidic Focus, Ink Pen, Needles.

name: Disguise Kit
description: Ability: Charisma. Utilize: Apply makeup (DC 10). Craft: Costume.

name: Forgery Kit
description: Ability: Dexterity. Utilize: Mimic 10 or fewer words of someone else's handwriting (DC 15), or duplicate a wax seal (DC 20).

name: Gaming Set
description: Ability: Wisdom. Utilize: Discern whether someone is cheating (DC 10), or win the game (DC 20). Variants: Dice (1 SP), dragonchess (1 GP), playing cards (5 SP), three-dragon ante (1 GP).

name: Dice Set
description: A gaming set variant. Ability: Wisdom.

name: Dragonchess Set
description: A gaming set variant. Ability: Wisdom.

name: Playing Card Set
description: A gaming set variant. Ability: Wisdom.

name: Three-Dragon Ante Set
description: A gaming set variant. Ability: Wisdom.

name: Herbalism Kit
description: Ability: Intelligence. Utilize: Identify a plant (DC 10). Craft: Antitoxin, Candle, Healer's Kit, Potion of Healing.

name: Musical Instrument
description: Ability: Charisma. Utilize: Play a known tune (DC 10), or improvise a song (DC 15). Variants: Bagpipes (30 GP, 6 lb.), drum (6 GP, 3 lb.), dulcimer (25 GP, 10 lb.), flute (2 GP, 1 lb.), horn (3 GP, 2 lb.), lute (35 GP, 2 lb.), lyre (30 GP, 2 lb.), pan flute (12 GP, 2 lb.), shawm (2 GP, 1 lb.), viol (30 GP, 1 lb.).

name: Bagpipes
description: A musical instrument variant. Ability: Charisma.

name: Drum
description: A musical instrument variant. Ability: Charisma.

name: Dulcimer
description: A musical instrument variant. Ability: Charisma.

name: Flute
description: A musical instrument variant. Ability: Charisma.

name: Horn
description: A musical instrument variant. Ability: Charisma.

name: Lute
description: A musical instrument variant. Ability: Charisma.

name: Lyre
description: A musical instrument variant. Ability: Charisma.

name: Pan Flute
description: A musical instrument variant. Ability: Charisma.

name: Shawm
description: A musical instrument variant. Ability: Charisma.

name: Viol
description: A musical instrument variant. Ability: Charisma.

name: Navigator's Tools
description: Ability: Wisdom. Utilize: Plot a course (DC 10), or determine position by stargazing (DC 15).

name: Poisoner's Kit
description: Ability: Intelligence. Utilize: Detect a poisoned object (DC 10). Craft: Basic Poison.

name: Thieves' Tools
description: Ability: Dexterity. Utilize: Pick a lock (DC 15), or disarm a trap (DC 15).

name: Acid
description: When you take the Attack action, you can replace one of your attacks with throwing a vial of Acid. Target one creature or object you can see within 20 feet. The target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 plus your Dexterity modifier and Proficiency Bonus) or take 2d6 Acid damage.

name: Alchemist's Fire
description: When you take the Attack action, you can replace one of your attacks with throwing a flask of Alchemist's Fire. Target one creature or object within 20 feet. The target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 plus your Dexterity modifier and Proficiency Bonus) or take 1d4 Fire damage and start burning.

name: Antitoxin
description: As a Bonus Action, you can drink a vial of Antitoxin to gain Advantage on saving throws to avoid or end the Poisoned condition for 1 hour.

name: Arcane Focus
description: An Arcane Focus is bejeweled or carved to channel arcane magic. A Sorcerer, Warlock, or Wizard can use such an item as a Spellcasting Focus. Variants: Crystal (1 lb., 10 GP), Orb (3 lb., 20 GP), Rod (2 lb., 10 GP), Staff (4 lb., 5 GP), Wand (1 lb., 10 GP).

name: Crystal
description: An arcane focus that can be used as a Spellcasting Focus by a Sorcerer, Warlock, or Wizard.

name: Orb
description: An arcane focus that can be used as a Spellcasting Focus by a Sorcerer, Warlock, or Wizard.

name: Rod
description: An arcane focus that can be used as a Spellcasting Focus by a Sorcerer, Warlock, or Wizard.

name: Staff (Arcane Focus)
description: An arcane focus (also functions as a Quarterstaff) that can be used as a Spellcasting Focus by a Sorcerer, Warlock, or Wizard.

name: Wand
description: An arcane focus that can be used as a Spellcasting Focus by a Sorcerer, Warlock, or Wizard.

name: Backpack
description: Holds up to 30 pounds within 1 cubic foot. Can also serve as a saddlebag.

name: Ball Bearings
description: As a Utilize action, you can spill Ball Bearings to cover a level, 10-foot-square area within 10 feet. A creature entering this area must succeed on a DC 10 Dexterity saving throw or have the Prone condition. Takes 10 minutes to recover.

name: Barrel
description: Holds up to 40 gallons of liquid or up to 4 cubic feet of dry goods.

name: Basket
description: Holds up to 40 pounds within 2 cubic feet.

name: Bedroll
description: Sleeps one Small or Medium creature. While in a Bedroll, you automatically succeed on saving throws against extreme cold.

name: Bell
description: When rung as a Utilize action, produces a sound that can be heard up to 60 feet away.

name: Blanket
description: While wrapped in a blanket, you have Advantage on saving throws against extreme cold.

name: Block and Tackle
description: Allows you to hoist up to four times the weight you can normally lift.

name: Book
description: Contains fiction or nonfiction. If you consult an accurate nonfiction Book about its topic, you gain a +5 bonus to Intelligence (Arcana, History, Nature, or Religion) checks about that topic.

name: Bottle, Glass
description: Holds up to 1½ pints.

name: Bucket
description: Holds up to half a cubic foot of contents.

name: Caltrops
description: As a Utilize action, spread Caltrops to cover a 5-foot-square area within 5 feet. A creature entering this area must succeed on a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw or take 1 Piercing damage and have its Speed reduced to 0 until the start of its next turn.

name: Candle
description: For 1 hour, a lit Candle sheds Bright Light in a 5-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 5 feet.

name: Case, Crossbow Bolt
description: Holds up to 20 Bolts.

name: Case, Map or Scroll
description: Holds up to 10 sheets of paper or 5 sheets of parchment.

name: Chain
description: As a Utilize action, you can wrap a Chain around an unwilling creature within 5 feet that has the Grappled, Incapacitated, or Restrained condition if you succeed on a DC 13 Strength (Athletics) check. Escaping requires a DC 18 Dexterity (Acrobatics) check; bursting requires a DC 20 Strength (Athletics) check.

name: Chest
description: Holds up to 12 cubic feet of contents.

name: Climber's Kit
description: Includes boot tips, gloves, pitons, and a harness. As a Utilize action, you can anchor yourself; you can't fall more than 25 feet from the anchor point and can't move more than 25 feet from there without undoing the anchor as a Bonus Action.

name: Clothes, Fine
description: Made of expensive fabrics and adorned with expertly crafted details. Some events and locations admit only people wearing these clothes.

name: Clothes, Traveler's
description: Resilient garments designed for travel in various environments.

name: Component Pouch
description: A watertight pouch filled with compartments that hold all the free Material components of your spells.

name: Costume
description: While wearing a Costume, you have Advantage on any ability check you make to impersonate the person or type of person it represents.

name: Crowbar
description: Using a Crowbar gives you Advantage on Strength checks where the Crowbar's leverage can be applied.

name: Druidic Focus
description: Carved, tied with ribbon, or painted to channel primal magic. A Druid or Ranger can use such an object as a Spellcasting Focus. Variants: Sprig of mistletoe (—, 1 GP), Wooden staff (4 lb., 5 GP), Yew wand (1 lb., 10 GP).

name: Sprig of Mistletoe
description: A druidic focus that can be used as a Spellcasting Focus by a Druid or Ranger.

name: Wooden Staff (Druidic Focus)
description: A druidic focus (also functions as a Quarterstaff) that can be used as a Spellcasting Focus by a Druid or Ranger.

name: Yew Wand
description: A druidic focus that can be used as a Spellcasting Focus by a Druid or Ranger.

name: Flask
description: Holds up to 1 pint.

name: Grappling Hook
description: As a Utilize action, you can throw the Grappling Hook at a railing, ledge, or other catch within 50 feet; it catches on if you succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity (Acrobatics) check. If you tied a Rope to the hook, you can climb it.

name: Healer's Kit
description: Has ten uses. As a Utilize action, you can expend one use to stabilize an Unconscious creature that has 0 Hit Points without making a Wisdom (Medicine) check.

name: Holy Symbol
description: Bejeweled or painted to channel divine magic. A Cleric or Paladin can use a Holy Symbol as a Spellcasting Focus. Variants: Amulet (1 lb., 5 GP), Emblem (—, 5 GP), Reliquary (2 lb., 5 GP).

name: Amulet
description: A holy symbol worn or held. Can be used as a Spellcasting Focus by a Cleric or Paladin.

name: Emblem
description: A holy symbol borne on fabric or a Shield. Can be used as a Spellcasting Focus by a Cleric or Paladin.

name: Reliquary
description: A holy symbol held. Can be used as a Spellcasting Focus by a Cleric or Paladin.

name: Holy Water
description: When you take the Attack action, you can replace one of your attacks with throwing a flask of Holy Water. Target one creature within 20 feet. The target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 plus your Dexterity modifier and Proficiency Bonus) or take 2d8 Radiant damage if it is a Fiend or an Undead.

name: Hunting Trap
description: As a Utilize action, you can set a Hunting Trap. A creature that steps on the plate must succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw or take 1d4 Piercing damage and have its Speed reduced to 0. Freeing a creature requires a DC 13 Strength (Athletics) check as an action.

name: Ink
description: Comes in a 1-ounce bottle, providing enough ink to write about 500 pages.

name: Ink Pen
description: Using Ink, an Ink Pen is used to write or draw.

name: Jug
description: Holds up to 1 gallon.

name: Ladder
description: A Ladder is 10 feet tall. You must climb to move up or down it.

name: Lamp
description: Burns Oil as fuel to cast Bright Light in a 15-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 30 feet.

name: Lantern, Bullseye
description: Burns Oil as fuel to cast Bright Light in a 60-foot Cone and Dim Light for an additional 60 feet.

name: Lantern, Hooded
description: Burns Oil as fuel to cast Bright Light in a 30-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 30 feet. As a Bonus Action, you can lower the hood, reducing the light to Dim Light in a 5-foot radius, or raise it again.

name: Lock
description: Comes with a key. Without the key, a creature can use Thieves' Tools to pick the lock with a successful DC 15 Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) check.

name: Magnifying Glass
description: Grants Advantage on any ability check made to appraise or inspect a highly detailed item. Can focus light to start a fire given bright sunlight, tinder, and about 5 minutes.

name: Manacles
description: As a Utilize action, bind an unwilling Small or Medium creature within 5 feet with the Grappled, Incapacitated, or Restrained condition on a DC 13 Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) check. Escaping requires a DC 20 Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) check; bursting requires a DC 25 Strength (Athletics) check.

name: Map
description: If you consult an accurate Map, you gain a +5 bonus to Wisdom (Survival) checks to find your way in the place represented on it.

name: Mirror
description: A handheld steel Mirror useful for personal cosmetics, peeking around corners, and reflecting light as a signal.

name: Net
description: When you take the Attack action, you can replace one of your attacks with throwing a Net at a creature within 15 feet. The target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 plus your Dexterity modifier and Proficiency Bonus) or have the Restrained condition until it escapes.

name: Oil
description: Can be used to douse a creature, object, or space, or as fuel for Lamps and Lanterns. A flask of Oil burns for 6 hours in a Lamp or Lantern. Lit oil in a 5-foot-square area deals 5 Fire damage to creatures entering or ending their turn there.

name: Paper
description: One sheet of Paper can hold about 250 handwritten words.

name: Parchment
description: One sheet of Parchment can hold about 250 handwritten words.

name: Perfume
description: Comes in a 4-ounce vial. For 1 hour after applying, you have Advantage on Charisma (Persuasion) checks to influence an Indifferent Humanoid within 5 feet of yourself.

name: Poison, Basic
description: As a Bonus Action, coat one weapon or up to three pieces of ammunition. A creature that takes Piercing or Slashing damage from the poisoned weapon or ammunition takes an extra 1d4 Poison damage. Potency lasts 1 minute or until its damage is dealt.

name: Pole
description: 10 feet long. You can use it to touch something up to 10 feet away. Can be used to vault for Advantage on Strength (Athletics) checks for High or Long Jumps.

name: Pot, Iron
description: Holds up to 1 gallon.

name: Potion of Healing
description: A magic item. As a Bonus Action, drink it or administer it to another creature within 5 feet. The creature regains 2d4 + 2 Hit Points.

name: Pouch
description: Holds up to 6 pounds within one-fifth of a cubic foot.

name: Quiver
description: Holds up to 20 Arrows.

name: Ram, Portable
description: Use to break down doors, gaining a +4 bonus to the Strength check. One other character can help, giving Advantage on the check.

name: Rations
description: Travel-ready food including jerky, dried fruit, hardtack, and nuts.

name: Robe
description: Has vocational or ceremonial significance. Some events and locations admit only people wearing a Robe bearing certain colors or symbols.

name: Rope
description: As a Utilize action, you can tie a knot with Rope on a DC 10 Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) check. Can be burst with a DC 20 Strength (Athletics) check. Can bind a creature with the Grappled, Incapacitated, or Restrained condition; escape requires a DC 15 Dexterity (Acrobatics) check.

name: Sack
description: Holds up to 30 pounds within 1 cubic foot.

name: Shovel
description: Working for 1 hour, you can use a Shovel to dig a hole that is 5 feet on each side in soil or similar material.

name: Signal Whistle
description: When blown as a Utilize action, produces a sound that can be heard up to 600 feet away.

name: Spell Scroll (Cantrip)
description: A magic item bearing the words of a cantrip. If the spell is on your class's spell list, you can read the scroll and cast the spell without Material components. Spell save DC 13, attack bonus +5. The scroll disintegrates when the casting is completed.

name: Spell Scroll (Level 1)
description: A magic item bearing the words of a level 1 spell. If the spell is on your class's spell list, you can read the scroll and cast the spell without Material components. Spell save DC 13, attack bonus +5. The scroll disintegrates when the casting is completed.

name: Spikes, Iron
description: Come in bundles of ten. As a Utilize action, you can hammer a spike into wood, earth, or similar material using a blunt object. Can be used to jam a door shut or to tie a Rope or Chain.

name: Spyglass
description: Objects viewed through a Spyglass are magnified to twice their size.

name: String
description: 10 feet long. You can tie a knot in it as a Utilize action.

name: Tent
description: Sleeps up to two Small or Medium creatures.

name: Tinderbox
description: A small container holding flint, fire steel, and tinder. Lighting a Candle, Lamp, Lantern, or Torch takes a Bonus Action. Lighting any other fire takes 1 minute.

name: Torch
description: Burns for 1 hour, casting Bright Light in a 20-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 20 feet. Can be used as a Simple Melee weapon (1 Fire damage on a hit) when you take the Attack action.

name: Vial
description: Holds up to 4 ounces.

name: Waterskin
description: Holds up to 4 pints. If you don't drink sufficient water, you risk dehydration.

name: Burglar's Pack
description: Contains: Backpack, Ball Bearings, Bell, 10 Candles, Crowbar, Hooded Lantern, 7 flasks of Oil, 5 days of Rations, Rope, Tinderbox, and Waterskin.

name: Diplomat's Pack
description: Contains: Chest, Fine Clothes, Ink, 5 Ink Pens, Lamp, 2 Map or Scroll Cases, 4 flasks of Oil, 5 sheets of Paper, 5 sheets of Parchment, Perfume, and Tinderbox.

name: Dungeoneer's Pack
description: Contains: Backpack, Caltrops, Crowbar, 2 flasks of Oil, 10 days of Rations, Rope, Tinderbox, 10 Torches, and Waterskin.

name: Entertainer's Pack
description: Contains: Backpack, Bedroll, Bell, Bullseye Lantern, 3 Costumes, Mirror, 8 flasks of Oil, 9 days of Rations, Tinderbox, and Waterskin.

name: Explorer's Pack
description: Contains: Backpack, Bedroll, 2 flasks of Oil, 10 days of Rations, Rope, Tinderbox, 10 Torches, and Waterskin.

name: Priest's Pack
description: Contains: Backpack, Blanket, Holy Water, Lamp, 7 days of Rations, Robe, and Tinderbox.

name: Scholar's Pack
description: Contains: Backpack, Book, Ink, Ink Pen, Lamp, 10 flasks of Oil, 10 sheets of Parchment, and Tinderbox.

name: Arrows
description: Comes in quantities of 20. Stored in a Quiver.

name: Bolts
description: Comes in quantities of 20. Stored in a Case.

name: Bullets, Firearm
description: Comes in quantities of 10. Stored in a Pouch.

name: Bullets, Sling
description: Comes in quantities of 20. Stored in a Pouch.

name: Needles
description: Comes in quantities of 50. Stored in a Pouch.

name: Camel
description: Carrying capacity: 450 lb.

name: Elephant
description: Carrying capacity: 1,320 lb.

name: Horse, Draft
description: Carrying capacity: 540 lb.

name: Horse, Riding
description: Carrying capacity: 480 lb.

name: Mastiff
description: Carrying capacity: 195 lb.

name: Mule
description: Carrying capacity: 420 lb.

name: Pony
description: Carrying capacity: 225 lb.

name: Warhorse
description: Carrying capacity: 540 lb.

name: Feed (per day)
description: Animal feed, per day.

name: Saddle, Exotic
description: Required for riding an aquatic or a flying mount.

name: Saddle, Military
description: Gives Advantage on any ability check you make to remain mounted.

name: Stabling (per day)
description: Cost for stabling an animal per day.

name: Airship
description: Airborne vehicle. Speed: 8 mph. Crew: 10. Passengers: 20. Cargo: 1 ton. AC: 13. HP: 300.

name: Galley
description: Waterborne vehicle. Speed: 4 mph. Crew: 80. Passengers: —. Cargo: 150 tons. AC: 15. HP: 500. Damage Threshold: 20.

name: Keelboat
description: Waterborne vehicle. Speed: 1 mph. Crew: 1. Passengers: 6. Cargo: 1/2 ton. AC: 15. HP: 100. Damage Threshold: 10.

name: Longship
description: Waterborne vehicle. Speed: 3 mph. Crew: 40. Passengers: 150. Cargo: 10 tons. AC: 15. HP: 300. Damage Threshold: 15.

name: Rowboat
description: Waterborne vehicle. Speed: 1½ mph. Crew: 1. Passengers: 3. AC: 11. HP: 50. Can be carried; weighs 100 pounds.

name: Sailing Ship
description: Waterborne vehicle. Speed: 2 mph. Crew: 20. Passengers: 20. Cargo: 100 tons. AC: 15. HP: 300. Damage Threshold: 15.

name: Warship
description: Waterborne vehicle. Speed: 2½ mph. Crew: 60. Passengers: 60. Cargo: 200 tons. AC: 15. HP: 500. Damage Threshold: 20.
